reviews.review_description: The jobs it self are fine but all I hear is German because it's a German game so whenever I was playing it I had to turn the game volume down and I had to find which audio bar it was in the menu because that's all German as well and surely I would have thought that they would have a language menu to change the language to English but that didn't exist.

developer_response.body: We have added English subtitles. Please try again with the new version! Thanks

reviews.review_description: Add enghlish plz cuz all l hear bgfgfdrgrbejgwtocs

developer_response.body: We have added English subtitles. Please try again with the new version! Thanks

reviews.review_description: I think this game is amazing, but I didn’t tried it because it have no English language!
